segments.text: Dr. talking from Tata Insurance. Is this Pankaj Baghel?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Which language are you comfortable with?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Ma'am, I am comfortable in Hindi.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Sir, this is an online term plan for which a telephonic medical verification will be done. Some verification and medical-related questions will be asked. The call will be recorded for audit and quality purposes. I will ask you some questions regarding the insurance application. Can we proceed?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Kindly note that whatever replies and information you provide about your health and habits will become part of the insurance application, and if the proposal is accepted, it will become a legal contract between you and Tata AIA Life Insurance. If you provide any incorrect or false statement, it will impact the contract, due to which the policy can be canceled, and the claim can be rejected. So, whatever you decide, please think carefully before giving an answer. I have your verification details, I just need to ask some questions to verify them. Tell me your full name.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Tell me the last four digits of your Aadhar card number.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: I'll ask some questions, if you have something, tell me, if not, say no. Increased or decreased blood pressure, increased cholesterol, triglycerides, or lipids?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: In the last 24 months, have you used smoking tobacco or nicotine products?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Has a doctor ever told you not to drink alcohol or to stop it?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No, never. This is like, sometimes people say it but I don't drink.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Have you taken any recreational drugs or narcotics that are not licensed, which you haven't told me about?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Height is 5'8" or 5'9", something in between.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Now I will ask some medical questions. If you have something, tell me, if not, say no. Increased or decreased blood pressure, increased cholesterol, triglycerides, lipids?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Chest pain, heaviness, heartburn, heart attack, coronary artery disease, heart valve disorder, congenital heart disease, palpitation, rheumatic fever, difficulty in breathing, or any heart condition?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Cancer, tumor, any type of cancer condition, uterine, blood cancer, enlarged nodes, unusual skin lesions, dysplasia, leukoplakia, sarcoma, tumor, polyps, cysts, lumps, or any other growth?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Diabetes, raised blood sugar, sugar in urine, hyperthyroidism, hypothyroidism, thyroid or any endocrine disorder?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Asthma, bronchitis, sinusitis, COPD, pneumonia, chronic or recurrent cough, dyspnea, emphysema, chronic pulmonary disease, or any respiratory disorder?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Hepatitis, hepatitis carrier, fatty liver, liver cirrhosis, jaundice, alcoholic liver disease, or any disorder of the liver?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Anemia, thalassemia, systemic lupus erythematosus, any blood disease or autoimmune disease?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Anxiety, depression, epilepsy, paralysis, numbness of limbs, stroke, transient ischemic attack, multiple sclerosis, Parkinson's, Alzheimer's, memory loss, or any neurological, nervous, mental health disorder?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Gastritis, gastroesophageal reflux disease, stomach ulcer, recurrent indigestion, irritable bowel syndrome, Barrett's esophagus, atrophic gastritis, Crohn's disease, ulcerative colitis, pancreatitis, or any stomach or intestinal problem?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No, not yet. And ma'am, please ask a little slowly.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Recurrent back pain, arthritis, gout, joint stiffness, muscular dystrophy, or any disorder related to muscles, bones, joints, neck, or spine?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Kidney stones, gallstones, kidney or urinary tract infection, blood or protein in urine, chronic kidney disease, kidney failure, fistulas, hydroceles, any disorder of kidney, bladder, genitals, prostate, or urinary system? Any kidney problem?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No, ma'am. Last time I had a railway medical, there was no such diagnosis.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: When was the full body health checkup?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Yes, the one for railway job, the general job before medical test.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Deafness, impaired hearing, speech problem, hoarseness of voice, difficulty in swallowing, ear discharge, any problem with ear, nose, or throat?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Anything else you want to tell me about your health or habits?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Nothing much. Just, you know, in Delhi, due to pollution, there's hair fall and all that. For that, I used shampoo and some multivitamins. That's all.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Which multivitamins did you take and for how long?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Like, there are vitamin B, B7, B9, B12, things like that, biotin. Biotin, Biotin.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: And was it prescribed by a doctor?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: It was from Himalaya. It was from Himalaya. Just that. Used it for one month, then stopped.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Biotin, it was B7. Yes, that type.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Yes, just that. I used that. It's also an Ayurvedic form, isn't it, Himalaya?
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Yes, just that. Almost everyone uses it nowadays.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: So whatever you reported, was it all normal?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Okay. In the last five years, any medical condition, any abnormal medical finding, pending test schedule, or planned medical tests like imaging, scan, report, X-ray, ultrasound, MRI, CT scan, PET scan, biopsy, ECG, treadmill, endoscopy, colonoscopy, blood or urine test?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Any medicine you were taking for two weeks, prescribed by a special doctor in a hospital for treatment?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Did you ever not go to work for two weeks?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Do you have any congenital disease or hereditary disease like cerebral palsy, Down syndrome, poliomyelitis?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Do you have any congenital disease or hereditary disease like cerebral palsy, Down syndrome, poliomyelitis?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Were you given any test, treatment, medical advice, counseling for sexually transmitted diseases like HIV and AIDS?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Has your weight decreased or increased drastically, or any other sign or symptom for which you received medical advice, treatment, or surgical procedures?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Vitamin B7, or whatever biotin you were taking... When did you start taking that?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Took it for about a month, it's been almost a year.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: It's been a year? Did you take it in 2020-2021?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: 20, 24, 25, meaning in December, and stopped in January.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: So, was it recommended by a doctor or?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Ma'am, basically, biotin can be taken normally by anyone. And for Himalaya, you consult with their tele-consultants and then take it.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: So you don't take it now, right?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: How many days did you take it for? Only one month?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: So everything is fine, you are fine now?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Yes, I'm fine. It's just that, you know, when you live in Delhi, NCR, there's hair fall. You feel like it's due to that.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: So you took it for hair fall?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Doctor, whatever answers you have given, are they all true?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Because your responses will become part of the call record, sir. Thank you for the information and cooperation.
segments.speaker: doctor
